title: Monocyte-derived transcriptomes explain the ineffectiveness of abatacept in rheumatoid arthritis
author: Takeshi Iwasaki
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: RSEM output of RNA sequence of rheumatoid arthritis patients treated with abatacept. Sample names beginning with“R” indicate responders, “NR” indicates non-responders; sample names ending with“0 M” indicate pre-treatment, and“_3M” indicates 3 months post-treatment. If you use this date, please cite Iwasaki et al. https://doi.org/10.1186/s13075-023-03236-y
